testsuite.name: provider health — computed fields in getAllProviderStats

testcase.name: getAllProviderStats includes avgLatencyMs and errorRate
testcase.classname: provider health — computed fields in getAllProviderStats

testcase.name: avgLatencyMs is 0 when no requests recorded
testcase.classname: provider health — computed fields in getAllProviderStats

testcase.name: errorRate is 0 for a provider with only successes
testcase.classname: provider health — computed fields in getAllProviderStats

testcase.name: getDegradedProviders key matches getAllProviderStats key format
testcase.classname: provider health — computed fields in getAllProviderStats

testsuite.name: provider health — TTL eviction and LRU

testcase.name: evicts stale entries after 6 hours on the next new-entry insertion
testcase.classname: provider health — TTL eviction and LRU

testcase.name: does NOT evict entries that are still within the 6-hour TTL
testcase.classname: provider health — TTL eviction and LRU

testcase.name: updates lastUsedAt on access (LRU touch)
testcase.classname: provider health — TTL eviction and LRU
